user_query:
I want to collaboratively shortlist and plan an evaluation of Python-centric workflow orchestration tools for our local data pipeline POC.

Please do the following and produce the specified deliverables:

1) Use search engine queries to identify at least four open-source, Python-first workflow orchestration frameworks that can run locally (developer laptops) and meet our constraints. Rely on official sources only (project websites, documentation, or repository pages). Do not include direct URLs in any output—record domains only.

2) Create a structured shortlist at outputs/shortlist.csv with these columns exactly:
- framework_name (string)
- official_site_domain (domain only, e.g., example.org)
- documentation_root_domain (domain only)
- repo_host_domain (domain only)
- license_identifier_or_text (string)
- meets_python_version (boolean; determined by input/constraints.yaml: python_version)
- meets_local_only (boolean; determined by input/constraints.yaml: execution_mode)
- is_open_source (boolean; derive from license)
- maintenance_status (one of Established|Active|Emerging)
- status_note (<=15 words explaining the maintenance_status)
- alignment_notes (<=50 words referencing at least two constraint keys from input/constraints.yaml)

3) Log your search activity to outputs/search_log.json as a JSON array. Include at least three distinct queries. Each entry must have: {"query": string, "timestamp_iso": ISO-8601 string, "purpose": string}. Keep purposes concise (<=20 words).

4) Edit and rewrite the local brief at input/project_brief.md to incorporate your findings and an iterative plan. Save the updated version to outputs/project_brief.v2.md. Add these sections at the top:
- "Shortlist Summary": list the selected framework names and one-line fit to constraints.
- "Iterative Evaluation Plan (2 weeks)": outline a collaborative, week-by-week plan with checkpoints and decision criteria aligned to the brief.
- "Open Questions for Stakeholders": list three concrete questions that need stakeholder input.

5) Draft stakeholder messages using input/stakeholders.csv. For each row, create outputs/emails/<name_slug>.txt (lowercase name, hyphens between words). Each message must include:
- A subject line.
- A personalized greeting by name and role.
- A concise summary of the shortlist (framework names only).
- The proposed iterative two-week plan at a high level (no dates needed—use "Week 1" and "Week 2").
- Two clear asks: feedback on must-have features and deployment preferences.
- A collaborative tone inviting iteration and checkpoints.

Key constraints:
- Use only official sources for attributes; record domains, not full URLs.
- The shortlist must reflect the constraints in input/constraints.yaml, and alignment_notes must explicitly reference at least two of its keys.
- All deliverables must be saved to the exact output paths specified.

Inputs you must use:
- input/project_brief.md
- input/constraints.yaml
- input/stakeholders.csv

Deliverables to create:
- outputs/shortlist.csv
- outputs/search_log.json
- outputs/project_brief.v2.md
- outputs/emails/<name_slug>.txt for each stakeholder All file paths are relative to the workspace directory.
